recording.title: New recording
recording.trustBadgeHint: Audio, transcript and search index stay on your Olares box. No cloud upload, no third parties.

meeting.listEmpty: No recordings yet. Use "Record" to start your first meeting.
meeting.processingHint: The recording is being transcribed. This view updates automatically.
meeting.notFoundHint: This recording does not exist or has been deleted.
meeting.listEmptyHome: No recordings yet — your first one starts at the top.

tags.sectionHint: Mark meetings with thematic tags to find them later — e.g. "Client Müller", "Q2 strategy" or "Sales pipeline". In the archive you can combine multiple tags as a filter.
tags.noneYet: No tags yet. Use "New tag" to create your first — e.g. "Client Müller" or "Q2 strategy".
tags.duplicate: A tag with this name already exists.
tags.pickerNoneMore: No other tags. Type a name to create one.

einstellungen.title: Settings
einstellungen.intro: Connect Insilo to your preferred language model. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works — the local Olares LiteLLM, your own Ollama server or an external provider. If you leave a field blank, Insilo uses the defaults baked into the deployment.
einstellungen.afterSave: Note: existing summaries are not regenerated. The new settings apply to future recordings and questions.
einstellungen.sectionLanguageHint: Choose the language Insilo uses to talk to you. Summaries are produced in this language too — even when the meeting was held in a different one.
einstellungen.sectionTemplatesHint: Each template defines via system prompt how the model structures the transcript. Adapt the prompts to your terminology — legal phrasing for client meetings, sales vocabulary for discovery calls. "Reset to default" returns to the factory template.
einstellungen.sectionSpeakersHint: People whose voice Insilo recognises. Once you assign a name to a voice in a transcript, the system learns the voice fingerprint — at the next meeting of the same person, the name appears automatically. All voice data stays on your Olares box; it never leaves the device.
einstellungen.sectionWebhooksHint: Let Insilo notify you when the status of a meeting changes — e.g. when a summary is ready. Insilo then sends a signed POST request to the configured URL. For meeting.ready the payload also contains the full meeting markdown.
einstellungen.sectionApiKeysHint: Keys allow external systems to read meetings via the REST API (/api/external/v1/meetings). Every key is scoped to your organisation — data leaves your box only where you hand over the key.

locale.switcherHint: Choose the language Insilo uses to talk to you.
locale.optionAutoHint: Insilo picks the language from your browser preferences.
locale.saveScopeOrg: Set as default for other members of this organisation

transcript.label: Transcript
transcript.noSpeech: No speech detected. The recording contained only silence or background noise.
transcript.editTip: Tip: click a section to assign the speaker. Existing entries can be renamed or deleted above.
transcript.rosterEmpty: No speakers yet. Click "Add speaker" or directly on a section in the transcript.

clusters.emptyPre137: No speaker clusters were stored for this meeting. If it was recorded before v0.1.37, you can trigger re-diarization from the detail page.
clusters.samplesTooltip: {count, plural, =1 {# voice sample} other {# voice samples}}
clusters.duplicateToast: A speaker with this name already exists.

dispatch.intro: Insilo sends the summary of this meeting ("{title}") to the selected recipients. This action requires your explicit confirmation — automatic delivery is configurable per webhook.
dispatch.noWebhooks: You have no active webhooks for meeting.ready yet. Configure at least one recipient under Settings → Webhooks.
dispatch.sentToast: {count, plural, =1 {Sent to # recipient.} other {Sent to # recipients.}}

summary.emptyExtract: The AI extracted no content from the transcript. The transcript likely contained too little material.

templatePrompts.noneYet: No templates yet. Use "New template" to create your first.
templatePrompts.descHint: What you use this template for — shown in the recording picker.
templatePrompts.descPlaceholder: e.g. Sprint review with action items
templatePrompts.promptHintCreate: Instructions for the language model on how to structure the transcript. New templates automatically use a flexible default schema (summary · key points · decisions · tasks · open questions).
templatePrompts.promptHintEdit: Instructions for the language model. The system fills in variables like the transcript automatically. This template is optimised for Qwen 2.5 (markdown sections, schema echo, few-shot example).
templatePrompts.errPromptTooShort: The system prompt must be at least 10 characters long.
templatePrompts.errFieldInvalid: Field name "{name}" invalid — only lowercase letters, digits and _ allowed (e.g. "date_of_birth").
templatePrompts.systemNote: This factory template has a fixed output schema and fixed fields in the summary. You can customise the name, description and system prompt for your organisation.
templatePrompts.fewShotIntro: Insilo sends this example to the AI before each real transcript so that it reliably hits the expected response format. It can currently only be modified on the factory template — customisation happens purely via the system prompt.

customFields.title: Additional fields
customFields.hint: Add your own fields to the summary — e.g. "date of birth", "witnesses", "case number". The AI fills them in alongside the standard fields. Existing standard fields are not overwritten.

templatePrompts.localeHint: Maintain a separate prompt per language. German is required — if another language is empty, Insilo automatically falls back to the German prompt.
templatePrompts.placeholderFallback: Leave empty to fall back to the German prompt.

webhookManager.noneYet: No webhooks yet. Use "Add new webhook" to set up a target URL — Insilo will then send a signed POST request there on every status change of a meeting.
webhookManager.manualTooltip: meeting.ready only fires when you manually click "Send to external systems"
webhookManager.autoTooltip: meeting.ready fires automatically after every recording

form.manualHint: You click "Send to external systems" per meeting. Other events (Created/Failed/Updated/Deleted) still fire automatically.
form.autoHint: Every finished summary is pushed immediately. Faster, but every recording leaves the box without confirmation.
form.errNoEvent: At least one event must be active.

webhookManager.secretHintBefore: Insilo signs every webhook POST with this secret in the header

webhookManager.contractRetryBefore: Retry behaviour: up to 2 retries on 5xx/timeout (30 s, 90 s backoff), no retry on 4xx. Idempotency via

speakerCatalog.addSampleTitleNew: Record voice sample (North Wind & Sun, ~40 s)
speakerCatalog.addSampleTitleAddon: Record additional voice sample (improves the voiceprint)
speakerCatalog.deleteConfirm: Delete speaker "{name}"? All voiceprints and meeting assignments will be removed.

form.clearVoiceprintHint: (all {count} samples will be deleted, Insilo learns the voice again on the next assignment)

form.nameHint: Choose a descriptive name — it helps you later identify which integration uses the key.

voiceEnrollment.intro: Read the following standard text aloud and clearly. It takes about 35–45 seconds and contains all important German phonemes — that way Insilo learns the voice particularly accurately.
voiceEnrollment.nordwindTitle: The North Wind and the Sun
voiceEnrollment.successDetail: {voiced} s of usable speech from {total} s of recording · speaker now has {samples}.
voiceEnrollment.samplesPlural: {count, plural, =1 {# voice sample} other {# voice samples}}
voiceEnrollment.deniedBody: Please allow Insilo to access your microphone in the browser settings and try again.
voiceEnrollment.unsupportedBody: Please use a recent Chrome or Safari browser.
voiceEnrollment.footerNote: The recording does not leave your Olares box.
voiceEnrollment.errEmpty: The recording was empty. Please try again.
voiceEnrollment.errLowSpeech: Too little detectable speech. Please try again.

about.heroTitle: Meeting intelligence that never leaves your premises.
about.heroBody: Insilo records business conversations, transcribes them and produces structured minutes — entirely on your Olares box in the server room. No cloud upload, no third parties, no telemetry.
about.step1Body: In the browser, on mobile or desktop. The PWA uses the MediaRecorder API — three clicks and the meeting is running. Audio is transferred to the box encrypted and lands in the hostPath.
about.step2Body: Whisper runs on the box. German language, around 30 seconds of processing per audio minute. Speaker diarization automatically detects who is speaking.
about.step3Body: A local language model creates structured minutes from your template. Ask questions across your meeting archive later — answers come with source citations.
about.promiseTitle: Not a single second of audio ever leaves your box.
about.promiseBody: Audio, transcript, embeddings and search index live on your organisation's hardware. Insilo does not phone home. If you wish to call an external language model, you make that choice deliberately in the settings — otherwise everything runs strictly locally.
about.promise4: LLM calls go either to the local Olares LiteLLM or your own endpoint
about.promise5: No telemetry, no phone home, no external fonts
about.audienceTitle: For organisations where confidentiality is not a marketing slogan.
about.personaLawBody: Client conversations under professional secrecy. No transfer to third parties — compliant with § 203 of the German Criminal Code.
about.personaTaxBody: Annual reviews, client confidentiality, GDPR. Structured minutes straight from the advisory session.
about.personaConsultBody: Strategy sessions and workshops. Make insights searchable without content landing in someone else's cloud.
about.personaIndustryBody: Factory-gate protection for IP, engineering details and supplier negotiations. Self-hosted infrastructure, your own compliance.
about.archPwaText: Next.js 15 (App Router, RSC). MediaRecorder API for the recording. Offline-capable via service worker.
about.archBackendText: FastAPI, asyncpg against the Olares system PostgreSQL. Authentication is handled by the Olares Envoy sidecar — we trust the X-Bfl-User header.
about.archTranscribeText: faster-whisper with large-v3, German language, optionally pyannote.audio for speaker diarization.
about.archLlmText: OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Default: the Olares LiteLLM gateway app. Configurable to any alternative under Settings.
about.archSearchText: BGE-M3 embeddings (multilingual), pgvector for distance search, grounded Q&A with source markers.
about.archStorageText: Audio in the Olares box hostPath. Transcripts, templates and org settings in PostgreSQL with row-level security.
about.signatureBody: While a recording is running, a 1-pixel-thin golden line pulses at the top of the screen. That is the only visual announcement. It is instantly legible without being intrusive — and it is proof that everything runs on your hardware, because what cannot be shown is not happening.
about.finalBody: Takes less than a minute. You will immediately see how transcription and summarisation run on your box — and can then adjust your templates and your language model.
about.footerRight: Self-hosted on Olares · Made in Germany
about.heroMockSpeaker1Text: We should discuss risk hedging in more depth at the next meeting.
about.heroMockSpeaker2Text: Agreed. I will bring the current status.
about.archDiagramCaption: Everything in one box — no external hop.
about.compliance2: GDPR Art. 28 not applicable — no external processors involved
about.speakerBody: Insilo recognises voices via an ECAPA-TDNN embedding. A short voice sample using the standard "North Wind" passage is enough — at the next meeting with the same person their name appears automatically in the transcript, with a match score and the option to override manually.
about.speakerBullet2: Dedicated voice sample via the "North Wind" standard passage
about.speakerBullet3: The voiceprint refines with every match
